since_last: 61% of 89 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +4.81%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 61% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.03% · BTC +2.61% · Gold +1.39% · Nasdaq100 -1.23%. 61% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +4.81%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +4.81%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.61%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: KLAC is the standout at -12.48%
cards.body: Leaders: APP +10.35%, CRWD +9.71%, META +9.46%, PLTR +8.69%, SNAP +7.21%. Laggards: KLAC -12.48%, LRCX -10.77%, TER -10.66%, AMAT -9.86%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -7.42% at $158.18
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -7.42% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
